home.title: Show up — there's a game forming near you.
home.subtitle: A mobile-first sports matching app for spontaneous football, tennis, basketball, and running groups in Timișoara.

proofCards.title: Deterministic first
proofCards.text: Hard matching rules stay explainable; AI enriches suggestions without owning eligibility gates.

proofCards.title: Event-scoped chat
proofCards.text: Group coordination and event threads are separate proof surfaces, not one combined message stream.

proofCards.title: Privacy-safe location
proofCards.text: Venue pins and approximate group centers are visible; exact home coordinates stay private.

proofCards.title: Honest Judge Mode
proofCards.text: Rubric rows must point to live, seeded, or fallback evidence before they are claimed.

signup.title: Create your ShowUp2Move account.
signup.body: Pick a username and password. We show one recovery code right after signup — the MVP does not use email or phone resets.
signup.cardTitle: Start with a private recovery code
signup.cardBody: Save it once. It's the only account-recovery path in this phase.

form.genericError: Check the details and try again.
form.recoveryBody: You'll need this code if you ever reset your password.
form.recoveryWarning: It will not be shown again.

signup.rateLimited: Too many signups from this device. Try again shortly.

login.title: Log in to keep the game moving.
login.body: You'll land back in the same session-backed MVP flow used by onboarding, matching, chat, and Judge Mode proof.
login.cardBody: Sessions are stored in an encrypted cookie.

form.genericError: Check the details and try again.
form.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Try again shortly.

recover.title: Reset access with your recovery code.
recover.body: This phase uses a one-time recovery code instead of email delivery, so the reset path stays demo-safe and deterministic.
recover.cardBody: A successful reset gives you a fresh recovery code.

form.genericError: Check the details and try again.
form.invalidRecovery: Username or recovery code is incorrect.
form.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Try again shortly.
form.successBody: Save this new recovery code. The old one no longer works.
form.recoveryWarning: It will not be shown again.

auth.brandTagline: A pickup game is forming nearby.

recoveryReveal.title: Save this recovery code.
recoveryReveal.body: It's the only way back into your account if you forget your password. We can't recover this for you.
recoveryReveal.label: Your recovery code
recoveryReveal.savedConfirm: I have saved it somewhere safe
recoveryReveal.privacy: We can't recover this for you. Save it now.
recoveryReveal.toastCopiedBody: Your recovery code is on the clipboard.

profile.title: Profile onboarding is next.
profile.body: Add the identity fields that group members see before sports, photo, location, and matching are enabled.
profile.cardBody: This is visible to matched groups and event members.

form.bioPlaceholder: What do you play, when are you usually free, and what kind of group feels right?
form.genericError: Check the details and try again.
form.unauthorized: Log in again before saving your profile.
form.fullNameRequired: Enter a real name using letters, spaces, apostrophes, or hyphens.
form.fullNameInvalid: Use letters, spaces, apostrophes, or hyphens for the name.
form.bioRequired: Add a short bio before continuing.
form.successBody: Sports, profile photo, and location are the next onboarding steps.

profile.subtitle: Set your display name and bio.
profile.bioPlaceholder: What do you play, when are you usually free, and what kind of group feels right?
profile.aiPausedSub: Pick sports manually on the next step.
profile.bioRequired: Add a short bio before continuing.
profile.fullNameRequired: Enter your full name to continue.
profile.unauthorized: Log in again before saving your profile.
profile.aiUnavailable: AI suggestions are paused right now.

sports.title: Choose the sports you'd show up for.
sports.body: Pick at least one sport and set a skill level. These choices become the first deterministic matching gate.
sports.cardBody: Per-sport levels override the profile fallback when matching groups.

form.genericError: Check the details and try again.
form.unauthorized: Log in again before saving your sports.
form.successBody: Location and distance are the next proximity gate.

sports.headerSubtitle: Pick what you like to play
sports.aiSuggestionsHint: From your bio — tap to add
sports.empty: Select at least one sport to continue.

location.title: Set a private home area and radius.
location.body: Matching uses coordinates for distance checks, but the app only exposes public venues and approximate group centers.
location.cardBody: Timișoara defaults are available to keep the demo flow fast.

form.genericError: Check the details and try again.
form.unauthorized: Log in again before saving location.
form.cityRequired: Enter a city with at least two characters.
form.successBody: The account now has the required profile, sports, and proximity fields for ShowUpToday.

location.headerSubtitle: City and how far you'll travel
location.locationDenied: Location denied — type your city manually.
location.locationError: Couldn't read your location — type your city manually.
location.locationOk: Got it. We'll use this for distance only.

photo.title: Add a photo
photo.subtitle: Optional — helps your team recognize you.
photo.uploadComing: Photo uploads are being wired up — your photo will save in a later step.
photo.aiPausedSub: We'll save the photo and you can analyze later.
photo.aiUnavailable: AI photo analysis is coming soon.

today.title: ShowUpToday
today.body: Answer once for the active Romania prompt window. A Yes response queues you for deterministic matching in the next slice.

card.matchedBody: A deterministic group exists for this prompt. Open the group chat to coordinate the first plan.
card.noMatchBody: Your response is saved, but there aren't enough nearby compatible players yet.
card.queuedBody: Your response is saved and will be reconsidered as more compatible players answer.
card.unavailableBody: Your response is saved and can be changed while this prompt window is active.
card.genericError: Couldn't save the response. Check your session and try again.

found.venueSub: Captain will lock the spot · ~2 km

group.title: {sport} group

achievement.firstMatchBody: Earned from a confirmed deterministic group match.

group.noEvent: The captain has not created an event plan yet.

eventForm.genericError: The event plan could not be created. Check your session and captain role.

form.genericError: The message could not be sent. Check your session and try again.
form.emptyBody: Start with the first concrete plan: time, venue, or who can bring equipment.

empty.title: No messages yet
empty.body: Say where and when works for you.

event.title: {sport} plan

weatherFit.outdoor_good: Clear enough to keep the outdoor option high.
weatherFit.indoor_recommended: Rain risk is high. Prefer an indoor or covered venue.
weatherFit.wind_warning: Wind may affect this sport. Keep an indoor fallback ready.
weatherFit.cold_warning: Cold conditions. Consider indoor play or a shorter session.

invite.title: Invite link
invite.body: Create a public preview link for this event. It does not include chat, attendees, votes, or private group details.
invite.genericError: The invite link could not be updated. Check your session and owner role.

event.venuesBody: Seeded venue candidates are ranked deterministically. The map proof starts with a privacy-safe list fallback and directions links.

form.genericError: The event message could not be sent. Check your session and try again.

voteForm.genericError: The vote could not be saved. Check your session and try again.

captainReveal.headline: Suggested plan
captainReveal.reasoning: 8 members voted after 18:00, weather is clear, venue is closest to the group center.

demo.title: Rubric proof, live.
demo.body: Each row points to the screen or route that proves it. Status colors are honest: live, seeded, fallback, pending.
demo.enabledBody: Demo proof is enabled by environment flag. Scoring rows stay unclaimed until later phases add live or seeded proof.
demo.disabledBody: Demo proof is disabled by environment flag. Scoring rows stay unclaimed until later phases add live or seeded proof.

controls.resetBody: This wipes demo-owned rows. Real accounts are protected by the demo_run_id ownership marker.
controls.notWired: Action not wired yet - run scripts/seed-demo.ts from CLI.

invitePreview.title: {sport} with ShowUp2Move
invitePreview.body: A private group is organizing this activity. Join or log in to coordinate in the app.

expired.title: This invite link is no longer active
expired.body: The invite was revoked, expired, or never existed. Ask the organizer to send a fresh link.

og.description: Pickup game on {when}. Sign up to coordinate.
og.descriptionWithCity: Pickup game in {city} on {when}. Sign up to coordinate.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.body: This route is not part of the current ShowUp2Move phase.

map.title: Nearby venues
map.subtitle: Public pickup spots near you. Map needs your location to plot you exactly.
map.locationDeniedBody: We can show events but cannot sort by distance.
map.privacyNotice: Privacy: we never store your exact home address. Pins are public venues only.
map.selectVenuePrompt: Tap a pin to see venue details.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.emptyBody: New matches, votes, and event updates will appear here.

groupsList.title: Your groups
groupsList.subtitle: Active groups you're a member of.
groupsList.emptyBody: Answer today's prompt to form your first group.

eventsList.title: Your events
eventsList.subtitle: Upcoming and past events you're attending.
eventsList.emptyBody: Create one or wait for today's match.

eventsNew.title: Create event
eventsNew.subtitle: Set up a public pickup before today's match.
eventsNew.comingSoon: Manual event creation is coming soon. Captains can create group-linked events from the group plan.

sports.title: Sports
sports.body: Pick up to six sports and your level.
sports.editHint: Edit your sports during onboarding for now. Inline editing here is coming soon.

location.title: Location
location.body: City and how far you'll travel. We never store your exact home address.
location.editHint: Inline editing of location is coming soon.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.public: Public — anyone with the username link
privacy.private: Private — only members of your groups
privacy.approxLocationBody: We always round and jitter your home — it never appears precisely on the map.

reminders.title: Reminders
reminders.body: We'll nudge you about prompts and events.
reminders.emailBody: We'll surface this once Resend is wired in.

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.stravaBody: Strava OAuth/import is on the bonus track.

publicProfile.title: Public profile
publicProfile.privateBody: Only members of shared groups can see it.
publicProfile.notFoundBody: This username doesn't exist or has been removed.

judge.title: Rubric proof, live.
judge.body: Each row points to the screen or route that proves it. Status colors are honest: live, seeded, fallback, pending.

controls.resetBody: This wipes demo-owned rows. Real accounts stay intact.

landing.headline: Show up. Move. Today.
landing.subhead: ShowUp2Move matches you with nearby players for football, basketball, tennis and more. AI does the matching. You just show up.

how.title: Four taps from idea to kickoff.

step1.title: Sign up
step1.body: Username + password. A recovery code, never an email blast.

step2.title: Set sports + location
step2.body: Pick what you play. Drop a fuzzy home pin. We never store the exact one.

step3.title: ShowUpToday?
step3.body: One tap each morning. Yes — we look for nearby players right now.

step4.title: Match + meet
step4.body: Captain auto-creates the event. Vote on the venue. Show up. Game on.

ai.title: AI matchmaking
ai.body: Find groups by sport, skill, and proximity in seconds.

venues.title: Real venues
venues.body: Suggested venues with weather, price tier, and directions.

show.title: Just show up
show.body: Captain auto-creates the event. You confirm. Game on.

footer.tagline: ShowUp2Move. Spontaneous sports matching for Timișoara.

leaderboard.title: Players this week
leaderboard.body: Points are awarded for showing up, captaining, and keeping streaks alive. Stub leaderboard — real ranking lands with the matching telemetry.

calendar.title: Your calendar
calendar.body: Confirmed events you said yes to. Each row exports a clean .ics you can drop into Apple/Google Calendar.

empty.title: No events yet
empty.body: Say yes on Today and we'll find you a group. Confirmed events show up here with a one-tap calendar export.
